findings.description: PascalCase class `ObjectMapperFactory` appears in s1's Map binding code example (`ObjectMapperFactory.create(Map.class, outputStream, config)`) but is absent from s1 hints.
PascalCase class `ObjectMapperFactory` appears in s2's Map binding code example (`ObjectMapperFactory.create(Map.class, outputStream, config)`) but is absent from s2 hints.
